articles.title: Meta Platforms surpasses Saudi Aramco in market cap, reclaiming top 10 status
articles.description: Meta's resurgence highlights the shifting economic landscape, emphasizing tech's growing dominance over traditional energy sectors. The post Meta Platforms surpasses Saudi Aramco in market cap, reclaiming top 10 status appeared first on Crypto Briefing.
articles.content: The social media giant's $1.67 trillion valuation edges past the oil behemoth, signaling a broader shift in how markets price innovation versus extraction Meta Platforms has overtaken Saudi Aramco in… [+1809 chars]
